tools.name: exposure_tool
tools.description: Adjust global exposure and brightness. Use this first to fix under/overexposure.

exposure.description: Overall exposure adjustment. Positive = brighter, negative = darker.

brightness.description: Filmic brightness adjustment. Fine-tunes midtone brightness.

tools.name: tone_tool
tools.description: Shape the tonal curve: contrast, highlights, shadows, whites, blacks.

temperature.description: Color temperature. Positive = warmer (yellow), negative = cooler (blue).

tint.description: Color tint. Positive = magenta shift, negative = green shift.

tools.name: saturation_tool
tools.description: Adjust global color saturation and vibrance.

saturation.description: Global saturation. Positive = more colorful, negative = desaturated.

vibrance.description: Smart saturation boost that protects already-saturated colors.

tools.name: hsl_tool
tools.description: Fine-tune individual color ranges (reds, oranges, yellows, greens, aquas, blues, purples, magentas). Each adjustment is independent.

adjustments.description: List of per-color-band adjustments. Each element: {color, hue, saturation, luminance}.

hue.description: Hue shift for this color band.

saturation.description: Saturation adjustment for this color band.

luminance.description: Luminance adjustment for this color band.
